content.full_text:
December 20, 2001

Marshall S. Rudolph
Office of the County Counsel
Mono County
Post Office Box 2415
Mammoth Lakes, CA 93546

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-280

Dear Mr. Rudolph:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of December 17, 2001, this letter will confirm that you have withdrawn your request for advice. Thank you for your courtesies in this matter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
